options.text: We have to keep moving—there's no time for breaks.
Of course! There's a bench right ahead—let's sit for five minutes.
Why are you so tired? You should exercise more.
I'll buy you a soda if you keep going.

content.explanation: 正确答案积极回应需求并提供具体方案，体现同理心。选项1冷漠拒绝，选项3指责对方，选项4用物质奖励转移责任，都不符合友好旅游对话的语境。
content.speakerText: I'm getting really tired—could we take a short break before the next site?
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很累了，我们能在下一个景点前休息一下吗？
